<?php /** * This file is part of the ZBateson\MailMimeParser project. * * @license http://opensource.org/licenses/bsd-license.php BSD */ namespace ZBateson\MailMimeParser\Header\Part; use ZBateson\MailMimeParser\Header\IHeaderPart; /** * Extends HeaderPartFactory to instantiate MimeTokens for its * newInstance method. * * @author Zaahid Bateson */ class MimeTokenPartFactory extends HeaderPartFactory { /** * Creates and returns a MimeToken. */ public function newInstance(string $value) : IHeaderPart { return $this->newMimeToken($value); } }
